title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hiranandani Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
